pre_correction_baseline.note: Verification identified 4 missed pattern types; task scope covers 3 (Non-Proprietary Name/Suffix is deferred — 1 example only, suggested_taxonomy_id conflicted with CAT-09-C now used for PMR)

new_categories_added.name: PMA device component deficiencies blocking NDA/BLA approval
new_categories_added.primary_detection_signal: PMA + Not Approvable letter + CDRH reference

new_categories_added.name: Clinical site GCP inspection deficiencies
new_categories_added.primary_detection_signal: CLINICAL SITE INSPECTIONS section header + GCP noncompliance language

miscategorizations_corrected.description: Impurity qualification studies placed under NONCLINICAL section header, miscategorized as CAT-05-A
miscategorizations_corrected.impact: 3 deficiency instances re-classified from standalone nonclinical gap to impurity characterization issue with nonclinical secondary tag

crls_previously_uncovered_by_new_cats.note: NDA 208276 and NDA 210136 appear in both CAT-11 and other new category lists

unique_crls_newly_covered.note: Approximate — actual unique count requires deduplication; some CRLs may qualify for multiple new categories simultaneously

accuracy_projections.note_on_delta: Correcting 3 miscategorizations in a 179-deficiency sample improves accuracy by ~1.7 percentage points if re-scored
accuracy_projections.caveat: Projections based on 30-CRL sample; full re-validation against 419-record database required for definitive metrics

cat04a_boilerplate_correction.recommended_update: Update taxonomy count from 310 to approximately 397 (96.7% × 411 CRLs)
cat04a_boilerplate_correction.root_cause: Original 75.4% estimate likely calculated differently or from a subset; verification sample strongly indicates near-universal presence

search_methodology.search_approach: Full-text search across all CRL text fields using regex pattern matching

verification_of_example_crls.NDA 208276: CONFIRMED — PMA Not Approvable letter from CDRH dated March 11, 2016 explicitly blocking NDA approval
verification_of_example_crls.NDA 215244: CONFIRMED — POSTMARKETING REQUIREMENTS UNDER 505(O)(3) section with 3 required studies (rat carcinogenicity, mouse carcinogenicity, PK/DDI)
verification_of_example_crls.NDA 207987: CONFIRMED — POSTMARKETING REQUIREMENTS UNDER 505(O)(3) section requiring patient registry for PTSMA procedures
verification_of_example_crls.BLA 761192: CONFIRMED — CLINICAL SITE INSPECTIONS section with for-cause GCP inspection findings including unblinding events and protocol deviations

deferred_items.status: DEFERRED — not included in v2.1 correction scope
deferred_items.reason: Only 1 example found (BLA 761133). Suggested taxonomy ID conflicts with CAT-09-C now used for PMR/PMC. Requires separate ID assignment (suggest CAT-09-D) and broader database search before inclusion.

files_written.description: Full taxonomy v2.1 with 3 new categories (CAT-11-A, CAT-09-C, CAT-04-H), miscategorization guidance, and boilerplate rate correction
Machine-readable detection rules for the 3 new categories plus the MISC-001 miscategorization correction rule
This file — quantitative metrics on all corrections, before/after comparison, and full CRL application number lists
